name: Trigon Metals Inc.
description: Trigon Metals Inc., now operating as Safi Silver Corp., is a Canadian-based exploration and development company. Historically focused on copper and silver assets in Africa, the company has strategically pivoted its operations to concentrate on high-grade silver exploration within Morocco’s Anti-Atlas belt. The company holds significant projects, including the Addana and Silver Hill properties, which are characterized by extensive vein systems and mineralization. By leveraging geological expertise and capital markets experience, the company aims to establish itself as a key player in the emerging Moroccan silver district through systematic exploration and development activities.
